Description & Key Components: Hero search bar: WHERE (patois placeholder 'Weh Yuh Deh?' / English: 'Where are you going?') / CHECK IN / CHECK OUT / TRAVELERS. Popular Destinations grid (Montego Bay, Kingston, Negril, Port Antonio, Ocho Rios). Featured Caribbean Retreats carousel. Trust section: Verified Hosts, Identity Verification, Secure Payments, Trusted Community. Pre-launch signup strip.

Grid of property cards (4→2→1 cols). Each card: WebP image, property name, parish, price/night, star rating, badge icons (Verified, Trusted, Wellness). Filter bar: Price range, Bedrooms, Amenities, Verified only, Badge level, Wellness. Sort: Recommended, Price low-high, Guest rating, Newest.
Full-width map with price pins. Left panel: condensed listing cards. Map pins update on hover. 'Back to list' CTA. Mobile: map full-screen with card drawer from bottom.

Photo gallery. Title, parish, guest/bed/bath, star rating + review count. Host card (badges, response time). Amenities grid. Description (expandable). House rules. Calendar. Price breakdown sidebar. Reserve Now CTA. Emergency: 119 displayed prominently on all Jamaica listings (M3-09).

Hero tagline: 'Di Riddim Right' (patois) / 'The rhythm is right' (English). Book food, music, water and wellness experiences. Cards with experience photo, name, provider, duration, price, category badge. Filter by category and parish.
Sort drawer: Recommended, Price low-high, Guest rating, Newest. Active sort shown in pill on filter bar.
'No stays match these filters.' CTAs: Try nearby dates, Remove a filter, Explore another parish. Always shows 3 suggested properties below the message.
Full experience page. Provider profile, description, included items, pricing, availability calendar, booking CTA. Trust badges. Platform messaging only.
Why NestyStay exists. Platform story and Jamaican identity. 4 pillars: Local teams, accountability, verification, island community. Founder biography.
Greeting for returning users: 'Welcome back, Bredda.' or 'Welcome back, Sistren.' (English: Brother / Sister). Searchable FAQ. Response standard: within one business hour.
Island stories, hosting guidance, platform updates. Card grid with featured image, title, category tag, date, read time.
Contact form: Name, Email, Subject, Message. WhatsApp direct link 754-248-2435.

Governing law: State of Florida, USA. Sections: Scope, Eligibility, Host/Guest Obligations, Officer Terms (non-negotiable section clearly marked), Liability, Privacy, Governing Law. Jamaica addendum linked.
GDPR and CCPA compliance. Data retention: booking records 7 years, officer ID logs deleted at annual reset (zero linkage), guest profiles account lifetime. No data sold.

Patois hero: 'Whaah Gwaan?' (large italic yellow) / 'What is going on?' (small gray below). Tagline: 'Stay close to the island. Book with confidence.' Email + Password. Continue CTA. Social auth: Google, Apple, Facebook. Post-login toast: 'Yuh Gud?' — 'Are you OK? Welcome back, [Name]!'
Patois header: 'Come Een!' / 'Come in! Welcome!' Two-path card: Join as Guest / Join as Host. Social auth on both paths.
Full Name, Email, Password (show/hide), Confirm Password. Role shown at top. Terms checkbox. 'Create account' CTA. Success state: 'Big Up Yuhself!' / 'Respect yourself! Well done!'
Provider logo. 'NestyStay only receives the profile details required to create or access your account.' Continue CTA. Role selection for new users.
6-digit OTP entry OR link confirmation. On success: 'Respek!' / 'Respect! / I appreciate you!' — Verification confirmed.
International phone number (Jamaica +1876 default). Verify and continue CTA.
6-digit code (auto-advance per digit). Helper text: 'Easy Nuh' / 'Take it easy — the code is on its way.' Countdown timer 5 min. Resend after timer.
Email field. Recovery link CTA. Below form: 'Nuh Worry Yuhself' / 'Don't worry about it — we'll sort this out.' Link expires 30 minutes.
New password fields. On success redirect: 'Yuh Back Inna Di Mix!' / 'You're back in the mix! Welcome back!'
QR code enrollment. On 2FA accepted: 'Everyting Criss' / 'Everything is perfect — authentication enabled.' Recovery codes shown — user must confirm saved. Per M2-07.

Property image + name. Dates. ADULTS stepper. CHILDREN stepper — label: 'Pickney' (patois) / 'Children' (English below). ACCESSIBILITY field. Protection: Included. Price: Stay + Service fee + Total. Continue CTA.
Guest name. Property summary. Dates. Total with breakdown. BILLING COUNTRY. Terms checkbox. 'Confirm booking' CTA. 'You won't be charged yet.'
Stripe Elements card field. Billing country. 'Confirm and pay' CTA. 256-BIT ENCRYPTED VERIFICATION badge.

'Irie!' (large, yellow, italic) / 'Excellent! — Booking confirmed.' Green checkmark (one-time animation). Confirmation number NST-2026-XXXX. Property details. Check-in/out. 'View reservation' CTA. 'Bless Up' notification sent to host.
'Dutty Tough' (patois) / 'Times are hard — let's try again.' 15-minute hold countdown. 'Try payment again' primary CTA. 'Find another stay' secondary.
'Request not approved.' No charge made. Explore similar verified stays CTA.
'Nuh Fret' (patois) / 'Don't worry — we're confirming your stay.' Clock icon. Host typically replies within 10 minutes. Date hold countdown.
'Suh It Guh' (patois) / 'That's how it goes.' Refund status and timeline. 'Find another stay' CTA.
Invoice NST-2026-XXXX. Guest + billing details. Price breakdown. Download invoice CTA.
Simpler confirmation of payment received. Amount, date, payment method (last 4). Download receipt CTA.
Welcome header with guest name. KPI strip: upcoming stays, protected amount, matches. Recent stays with status badges. Notification center.
Matched stays. 'Available' status. Dates, price, match score. 'Explore Jamaica' CTA.
Upcoming bookings: image, name, dates, status badge. 'Prepare for check-in' CTA for next stay.
Completed stays. Rating given / 'Write a review' if pending. Re-book CTA.
Cancelled bookings with reason. Refund status. '$0 outstanding' if fully refunded.
Full booking breakdown. Host contact via platform. Check-in instructions. Cancellation policy. QR code for gated community entry if applicable.
Grid of saved properties. Availability status per stay. Unsave (heart toggle).
Named collections (Honeymoon, Business Trips). Create, rename, delete. Drag-and-drop.
Saved cards (last 4 + expiry). Default card. Add via Stripe. Remove CTA. Stripe tokenized — no full card numbers stored.
All transactions. Filter by date/status. Download receipt per row.
All invoices. Filter by year. Bulk download.
Full name, email, phone. Photo upload. Language, currency, communication preferences. 'Jamaican Patois greetings' toggle — default ON. Delete account: 'One Love' / 'Goodbye / Peace.'
Verification status: Verified / Pending / Action required. Document type, renewal date. Re-verify CTA. Alibaba eKYC embedded.
Destination types, amenity preferences, budget range, accessibility needs. Patois toggle here too.
Published reviews with property, date, rating, text. Host reply shown. Edit within 48h.
Reviews due (deadline countdown). Notifications center: messages, status changes, payments.
KPI: REVENUE, OCCUPANCY, GUEST LOVE, OPEN TASKS. Revenue chart (30/60/90 day). Top-earning properties. Payout schedule. Export CSV.
Occupancy trend. Avg nightly rate. Page views. Booking conversion. Guest origin map. Export.

All properties. Each card: thumbnail, name, status (Published/Draft/Archived), badge, occupancy, next booking. Header: 'Manage Your Yard' (patois) / 'Manage Your Properties' (English below). Empty state: 'Run Di Ting' / 'Handle it — create your first listing.'
Archived listings. Re-activate CTA. Delete permanently (with confirmation modal).

Steps: Property type → Location → Capacity → Amenities → Photos → Description → Pricing → Availability → Guest verification upsell toggle (M4-06) → Review. On publish: 'Galang Bad!' toast / 'You're doing amazing — listing published!'
Same sections as wizard, inline editing. Draft or publish. Change history log.
Calendar with rate overlays. Independence Week, Christmas/New Year, Easter, Carnival. Minimum stay per season.
Create promotion: discount %, eligible dates, minimum nights, badge level. Last-minute discount toggle.
Bookings table: guest name, property, dates, status (PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED/CANCELLED/COMPLETED). Approve/Reject CTAs. iCal sync status.
Monthly summary: revenue, occupancy, bookings, cancellations, review score. Export PDF/CSV.
Booking history, Revenue, Guest list, Tax report. Date range. Download per type.
All guest reviews. Reply CTA (30 days). Flag for moderation. Average by property.

Current badge (FREE/VERIFIED/TRUSTED/WELLNESS). Unlock path for next level. Trusted Badge $49 CTA. Guest verification toggle per property. Founding Member status. Trusted Badge renewal date. 2FA link.
Calendar across ALL managed properties. Color-coded by unit. Booking conflicts highlighted. Block dates across multiple units. iCal sync status per property.
Conversation list sorted by most recent. Name, Verified badge, last message, timestamp, unread count. Filter: All / Guests / Hosts / Support. Search.
Booking reference linked. Archived tab.
Thread with timestamps. Read status. Typing indicator. Booking context card pinned top.
Photo attachments with thumbnail and file size. Tap to expand. Max 10MB. WebP preferred.
PDF attachments. Secure link (expires 24h). Used for: arrival guides, receipts.
Patois: 'Mi Deh Yah' / 'I'm right here' — replaces 'Online now' for consenting hosts.
'Offline · replies when connected.' Response time shown.
'Read · 9:44 AM' under sent messages. Unread: 'Delivered' only.
Automated + human support. Verification confirmations, booking status, payment notifications. Cannot be deleted.
KPI: ACTIVE USERS (18.4k), VERIFIED STAYS (1,248), OPEN CASES (24), RISK ALERTS (7). Activity feed: VERIFIED / FLAGGED items.
Trend charts: users, listings, bookings, revenue, verification rate, cancellation rate. Export CSV.
Directory: name, email (hashed), role, status. Suspend / Reinstate / Delete. Audit log.
All listings: VERIFIED/FLAGGED/PENDING REVIEW. Remove, suppress, or approve. Flag history.
All bookings. Full timeline per booking. Override status (admin only, mandatory reason + audit log).
All Stripe transactions. Refund initiation. Payout status. Revenue reconciliation.
Case ID (NST-240 format). Type, parties, status. Evidence uploads. Resolution: Full refund / Partial / Dismiss.
Helpdesk queue. Priority, SLA timer. Assign to team. Internal notes. Close with summary.
Platform reports. Compliance report for Jamaican tax authorities. Scheduled weekly/monthly email.
Risk scoring per user. Flagged items. Ban/whitelist actions. Case creation from flag.
Flag reason, date, source (user report / auto-detection). Resolve: Clear / Suspend / Remove.
'Sign in required.' Log in to continue. 'Return safely' CTA.
'Access is restricted.' No mention of specific permission missing.
'This page drifted away.' Return to trusted stays or search Jamaica. 'Return safely' CTA + search bar.
'Something needs attention.' Team notified. Data protected. Error reference code for support.
'We are preparing the next welcome.' NestyStay back shortly. Bookings preserved. WhatsApp 754-248-2435.
Patois tagline: 'Tek Time' / 'Take your time — we're loading your island experience.' 1200ms shimmer. Never blank.
'No properties yet.' Create listing or explore CTA.
'No favorites saved.' Save a stay to return to it here.
'Your inbox is clear.' New messages will appear here.
'No reservations found.' Explore verified stays or adjust dates.

Public host profile, biography, trust indicators, badges, reviews, listings, Link Mi/contact, editing, preview, privacy/visibility states. Detailed IDs referenced by Appendix A; only HPRO-05 phrase row is explicit in document.
